issue_body_preview:
The hot reload of Markdown files is not working with Nextjs. This means, you'll have to reload the server manually, everytime you want to change smthg. I think it has something to do with @parcel/watch because this is logged in the console:
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/44934c
test_description_zh: 在 Windows 环境下使用 Next.js 项目，启动开发服务器后，修改一个 Markdown 内容文件（如更改标题或正文），观察页面是否自动热更新显示最新内容，无需手动重启服务器或刷新页面。
expected_result_zh: 修改 Markdown 文件并保存后，浏览器页面应自动热重载，展示更新后的内容，无需手动重启开发服务器或手动刷新页面。
